list.txt: - Everything went well. Thank you!
- this is a very great apartment. Staff are very helpful, friendly and fast respond to our request. I will recommend to all my friend to this apartment if they visit Barcelona.

- Easy access into building and then in a modern elevator to the apartment. Wonderful view of the Ria from the balcony. The property is well furnished and equipped throughout and spotlessly clean. One of the best Airbnbs we have stayed in. Alvaro is a good host leaving helpful suggestions and a welcome pack of water, tea, coffee and a great wine. Thank you. There are a splendid selection of restaurants nearby; indeed everywhere is walk-able. We hope to return in the future.
- Siempre hubo una comunicación muy fluida con Álvaro. El apartamento está muy equipado y bien ubicado. Además nos dejaron hacer late check out sin ni un problema. Seguramente volveremos.

- Mooi appartement met een super locatie. Alles op loopafstand. We hebben 2 eilanden bezocht met de ferry, aanrader. Ook het oude gedeelte van Olhao, de (boeren)markt, de leuke straatjes en steegjes. Het appartement is brandschoon en Alvaro maakte het voor ons mogelijk om de laatste dag het appartement ook nog te gebruiken, zonder extra kosten. Dit was erg fijn omdat onze terugvlucht pas in de avond was. Zéker een aanrader dit appartement.

- The location of this apartment is great - so close to restaurants, supermarket, ferry to islands etc., but right on the edge of the town so not too noisy. There was a little noise late afternoon and early evening, but quietened down later, and never disturbed by noise at night. Nice to be greeted by next door's parrot every morning. The apartment itself was much as described - very spacious lounge and bedrooms, with comfortable furniture. Lovely to have the balcony with sea view. Our only slight issue was with the bathrooms, as access to shower was tight in shower room, and the bath was very high to get in and out of. Otherwise loved everything about this apartment, and would probably stay there again.

- Die Unterkunft war perfekt: sehr komfortabel, schön eingerichtet, alles von guter Qualität, mit großzügigen Räumen und genug Platz für alles. Alvaro hat an alle Bequemlichkeiten gedacht – die Küche ist voll ausgestattet, die Terrasse ist groß und bietet bequeme Sitzmöglichkeiten. Alles ist gut erreichbar, da es das letzte Haus ist, das noch zur Altstadt gehört. Uns hat hier selbst im Januar sehr gut gefallen und wir möchten wiederkommen. Der Stellplatz in der Tiefgarage ist auch wertvoll – sonst muss man Parkgebühren zahlen.

- We thoroughly enjoyed our 5 nights at Alvaro's spacious and well-equipped apartment. Great location - just a short walk to the historic Olhao market on the seafront, lots of cafes and restaurants very nearby, and easy walks through the cobblestone lanes to shops and more restaurants. Alvaro's apartment is one of the best equipped Airbnb places I have stayed at (travel adaptors too!), with generous, thoughtful touches like a bottle of wine, crackers and fish pates. Alvaro was proactive with information, and responded very quickly to our questions. Highly recommended if you're planning a trip to this part of Portugal.

- We loved our stay at Alvaro's amazing apartment in a superb location. The wonderful space is beautifully finished and very well kitted out with everything we could have wanted. The kindness of supplying coffee, tea, water and snacks was very much appreciated. We highly recommend your apartment, thank you Alvaro! Ps The food in Tapas e Lendas just outside the apartment is fantastic!

- The apartment was exactly as described. The location is prime and the outdoor balcony has a lovely view of the Marina and the goings on of the people walking by. The apartment was very secure and the reception and hallways were well maintained. Alvaro was very quick to respond and as helpful as he could be regarding any issues.

- Carla war eine sehr zuvorkommende Gastgeberin. Das Appartement war sehr schön, die Terrasse wunderbar zum entspannen. Die U-Bahn Station Paral-el nur 3 Minuten zu Fuss. Ich kann das Appartement bei Stay Together nur weiter empfehlen.
- Wunderbares Apartment tolle Terrasse und bei späterer Anreise war der gefühlte Kühlschrank eine schöne Überraschung. Super ruhig für diese zentrale Lage
- Host reattivo e disponibile. Appartamento piacevole, bellissima vista e in posizione super comoda per la metropolitana. Consigliato
- Très bon séjour l'appartement est parfaitement fonctionnel proche de l'arrêt de bus et métro très pratique pour découvrir Barcelone
- Great host very accommodating. Nice place.
- Excellent location - 1 minute walk to the metro station. 5 minute walk to the Sant Antoni market. Amazing views of the Poble-sec neighborhood.
- loved the rooftop view
- Great location! Communication was great and very nice waiting area for luggage storage and refreshments. Very clean and enjoyable apartment, highly recommend!
- Amazing location! The apartment was great, has everything you could need, the rooftop was a fab extra. The hosts were lovely and welcoming. Would definitely return next time I’m in Barcelona
- A great, comfortable, safe and impressive place to stay; hosts were incredibly communicative and went out of their way to make sure we felt welcomed and had an enjoyable stay.
- Super Unterkunft. Sehr schön und sauber! Clara & Francesco waren sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit.

- Это прекрасное место. Подходит и тем кто приезжает работать и для отдыха. Очень тихо. Очень уютно. Бельё чистое и свежее. Хозяева просто великолепные люди. Полное внимание к жильцам. Очень добродушно относятся к гостям
- Très bel appart, bien situe, belle et grande terrasse, lit King très confortable, service et réponses no 1 je recommande sans hésiter, nous y retournerons
- Excellent séjour. Bien situé, pas loin du centre. Bien isolé du bruits de la rue. Très bonne communication avec les hotes.
- Nice little apartment, walking distance to attractions and transport, very clean and communication with Carla was great. I would definitely recommend.
- O apartamento é como está nas fotos, é confortável, a localização é boa, perto de metrô e paradas de ônibus. A recepção é amigável e pronta para ajudar. Gostei bastante, recomendo!
- Perfect from A to Z!
- Merci à Carla pour son aide et sa gentillesse. Une endroit superbe pour rester quelque jours à Barcelone.
- Very kind and helpfull. They went to the pharmacy with my friend to help me get mediciation for migraines. Lovely appartment, close to everything. Super!!!
- Le logement était tres bien situé. nous avons passé un súper moment dans l’appartement, notamment sur la terrasse privative. je recommande

- Stayed at the penthouse apartment for seven days and loved the private terrace that comes with it. It was clean and they actually asked during the stay if they can clean it during the stay as well. Towels were changed and they checked in several times if everything is in order and if anything was needed. The bus stop and a metro stop in front of the building add additional bonus. Several grocery shops in walking distance as well as bars and restaurants. You do need to take into account that the apartment is facing a busy road however, I as a light sleeper, still found it peaceful enough during the night. Great stay!
- 친절하게 응대해주시고 숙소가 너무 귀여웠어요. 숙소가 잘 정돈되어있고 발코니가 너무 좋았습니다.
- Great location and great views
- Amazing top floor apartment in the heart of Barcelona with amazing views from the private terrace. Also amazing hosts who were very friendly and helpful, so all around great place

- Unser Aufenthalt bei Stay Together in Barcelona war einfach hervorragend,das Haus war sehr sauber und ordentlich und alles entsprach genau der Beschreibung in der Anzeige in wirklichkeit ist die unterkunft sogar noch schöner und besser als auf den Fotos zu sehen,die Lage ist ausgezeichnet ! Wir haben uns während des gesamten Aufenthalts sicher und wohl gefühlt genau wie zu Hause außerdem war das haus ruhig und perfekt zum entspannen nach einem langen Tag ,es war wirklich eine tolle Erfahrung, und wir würden bei unserem nächsten Besuch in Barcelona sehr gerne wieder hier übernachten. Ein besonderes Dankeschön an (Francesco) für seine freundliche art, seine aufmerksamkeit und seine Fürsorge während unseres aufenthalts,er war wirklich eine großartige Person und hat unsere Erfahrung noch schöner gemacht. Wir können diese Unterkunft jedem empfehlen, der eine sehr komfortable Unterkunft in sehr guter Lage in Barcelona sucht.

- This is a rather sterile aesthetic but that can also read as clean so we can call it a win! Lots of good food and shopping and sites within walking distance. Loved having the terrace for more space even though weather didn’t permit lots of time to enjoy it. The rules about noise are very clear and that added to a really nice stay. Comfortable bed with plenty of pillows. Would have loved some rugs or throw blankets around but otherwise we had all we needed. The had free beer and coke in the fridge. We don’t drink either but it was a generous offer. Kitchen adequate for simple meals. Really rather spacious for a European apartment. Thank you for a pleasant stay! The site with allllll the travel exploring ideas was wonderful too!
- Den besten Blick von der Dachterasse

- Great location, short walk into the centre. Great staff it was quick and easy to check in with luggage lockers to store bags before or after your stay
- As described. Good location.

- My family thoroughly enjoyed our time at the stay together apartments. Our host was gracious and pleasant. The apartment was spacious and comfortable. The amenities provided for all our needs. The location is close to many cafes and shops. I highly recommend the stay together apartments for your visit to Barcelona.

- This was a great apartment in Barcelona. It was very easy to access the train and buses. There were also many food options nearby. We ate at the tapas restaurant 3x during our stay because the food was delicious and the location was so convenient. There were also many brunch and breakfast options nearby. Our family of 6 felt very comfortable here. Would definitely stay here again.
- Great
- Apartment is clean and convenient, just 200 meters to Metro, staff are nice and helpful especially Carla, she always friendly and cheerful to help solve problems, highly recommended.
- Was great. Would stay here again.
- Nice and clean place to stay
- Great place. Check-in and check-out was very easy. Everyone was very friendly and helpful. Good location with quick access to public transportation.

- Everything was amazing from start to finish. The apartment was clean, comfortable, and in a perfect location. Our host was incredibly helpful, responsive, and went above and beyond to make sure we were well taken care of throughout our stay. We truly felt welcomed and enjoyed every moment here. Highly recommended!
- The location was amazing, the standards were excellent and the service all round was as good as anything I’ve had on AirBnB I cannot recommend them highly enough.

- Really enjoyed our stay here. The apartment was in a really good location, right near a metro that was convenient, and there’s shops/supermarket nearby which was super handy. The apartment had great amenities and was spacious - the rooftop was a nice intimate place. The hosts were super responsive and helpful whenever i had any questions and was very accommodating to check in and checkout times which was really great. Would recommend.

- Great stay! The host was very friendly and responded quickly to all messages. The room upgrade and late checkout were really appreciated. The apartment was clean, well-maintained, and very comfortable. Would definitely stay here again!

- Beautiful apartment! Bigger than we expected, with everything provided within. Owners were very helpful, always responding quickly and always did their best to accommodate us. Lots to do in walking distance and easy access to the metro which is only a few minute walk away.
- Perfect welcome
- Her şey mükkemmeldi, konum temizlik kolaylık, çok teşekkür ediyoruz, bir sonraki gelişimizde başka yer aramayacağız.
- Fedt sted. Lokalt. Søde hosts
- Our multi-generational group had a lovely stay! We appreciated the extra cleanings and how helpful Francesco and Carla were with any questions or needs we had.

- A comfortable place in great location. We, Asian family, booked for a 3-bedroom apartment. The place was nice and clean, well-equipped kitchen and comfortable beds. The towels are new and clean. The location may be slightly off the center (shopping area) but is within 10 mins walk and also 10 mins to the beach. There were complimentary Nespresso shots, beer and coke upon arrival. The subway station is just around 100m from the apartment. There are lots of small grocery stores and eateries/restaurants around including McDonalds (great when you have kids!). The host also helped book airport transfer for us on the way back which worked out well. Great stay and will definitely come back if we ever get a chance to visit Barcelona again.

- The Stay Together apartment and our host were absolutely wonderful. Such a lovely location and the apartment was fully stocked, which was a welcome relief coming off of 20 hours of travel. Zimski praznici u Barceloni - Vrlo prostran i lijep stan, na 5. katu, s dizalom u stubištu. Svaka soba ima balkon! Odličan pogled, pogotovo s terase na 6. katu, za koji postoji ključ i korisnici stana je mogu upotrebljavati. Sve je bilo čisto i uredno, održavano. Kuhinja je opremljena aparatima (suđerica, pećnica, aparat za kavu),, čistim krpama i spužvicama i osnovnim namirnicama (sol, papar, ulje, čaj, deterdžent i tablete za suđericu...), a postoji i filter za vodu. Dočekali su nas pokloni u frižideru - pivo za odrasle, cola za djecu, kava i čaj. U kupaoni se nalaze šamponi, sapuni, čak i krema za tijelo. Na balkonu su i mašina za veš i sušilica te deterdžent. Kreveti su vrlo udobni. Tijekom boravka jednom nam je očišćen cijeli stan, promijenjeni ručnici i posteljina. Podrška gostima je prisutna cijelo vrijeme, Francesco nam je bio na pomoć u svemu - od organizacije prijevoza s aerodroma, preko snalazenja u gradskom prometu, savjetovao nas je oko restorana i preporucio uzivanje u lokalnim obicajima (Festa Sveta Tri Kralja). Na ulazu u zgradu je recepcija, osjecali smo se sigurno i ugodno tijekom cijelog boravka. Apsolutno za svaku preporuku!

Przerósł nasze oczekiwania :) - Przestronny, czysty, jasny i z ładnym widokiem z każdej strony. Ogromnym atutem jest możliwość wyjścia na dach. Byliśmy w 3 pary i każdy mógł odnaleźć kąt dla siebie. Jesteśmy zachwyceni. Aż szkoda, że mieliśmy tak mało czasu, by wykorzystać apartament w pełni :)
- Grand appartement, bien situé, proche de tout
- Comfort & Location
Excelente estadía familiar - Todo estuvo muy bien, apartamento espacioso, muy limpio y luminoso
Perfekt für große Gruppen! - Super Lage und ein wirklich großes, schönes und vor allem sauberes Apartment!

Loved the place. Also a great bar nearby with music on weekends- London Bar. Definitely a go to! - Very clean. Excellent location. Very close to the subway. The apartment was very well set up. Two bathrooms, kitchen with washer/dryer. Roof top that was private and large. Nothing

- Apartament spațios. Dotări super: mașină de spălat vase, mașină de spălat rufe, uscător, ........ Am găsit în frigider 2 baxuri de bere și un bax de suc. Saltelele superconfortabile, cele mai bune pe care am dormit. Accesul la terasă cu priveliște superbă. Ușile scârțâie, și nu se pot bloca ( lipsă de intimitate)
Appartement magnifique avec tout le confort - Tout était parfait Rien
Den pefekt sted at bo som familien i Barcelona. - Alt. Det var en rent og stor lejlighed. 4 sovevælser, en dejlig stor køkken med alt udstyr du kan tænke om. Stuen var perfekt. Intet.

Great apartment for a city break in Barcelona. - The apartment is in a great central location, very close to the metro, which makes getting around easy. The host is friendly and helpful, ensuring a smooth stay. The apartment itself is comfortable and spacious, with the added bonus of a private terrace. There is also a convenient option to store luggage, which is very useful before check-in.

Memorable visit to beautiful Barcelona - Excellent hosts, good value, great location. Would definitely stay in this apartment again. Lucky enough to have an apartment on the top floor with a beautiful roof terrace.

- Communication with the owner, Alvaro, was very good. He quickly answered any messages. As he had no guests the day before we arrived and the day after, we were able to check in earlier and checkout later. The apartment was very clean. There were only four of us, but plenty of room for six. The kitchen was well equipped, and Alvaro will take on board a few suggestions that I made for some extra items. Markets, supermarket, and ferry terminal were all a short walk away. Lots of restaurants, bakers and pastelarias as well. The power cut out once when it was overloaded with the aircon, two hot plates and the kettle. We just turned some items off and turned the power back on in the fusebox near the entrance to the flat.

- Tremendous location near the waterfront, fish market and ferries. The spacious apartment is fully equipped for cooking and socializing, and the large balcony has views of the water. Self check-in was simple, underground parking was convenient and the hosts quickly respond to questions, and are informative, hepful and friendly. We will definitely return to this lovely home. Everything was wonderful.

Ev gibi - Daire çok temizdi. Yatak rahattı. Çift banyo olması çok iyiydi. Mutfakta buzdolabı, fırın, ocak, kahve makinesi, su ısıtıcı, ekmek kızartma makinesi ve terasta çamaşır yıkama ve kurutma makinesi var. Isınma klimayla ama gayet iyi ısınıyor. Kapı için anahtar yerine şifre olması da iyiydi; anahtar taşımak zorunda kalmadık. Mutfakta yeterli araç gereç ve hatta zeytinyağı, tuz, baharat, kapsül kahve, kahve kreması vs malzemeler de vardı. 1 hafta kaldık. Tatilimizin ortası gibi temizlik yapıldı, çarşaflar-havlular değiştirildi. Konumu çok merkezi. 20 metre ileride Parallel metro istasyonu var. Yakınlarda marketler, eczaneler, cafeler, restaurantlar hepsi mevcut. Banyolar gayet modern ve temiz. Yemek yapma alanı yeterli. Ayakkabılar için bile raflar var. Gayet iyi planlanmış. Terastaki alanda çamaşır makinesi, kurutma makinesi ve kapsül deterjanlar mevcut. Yürüyerek pek çok yere ulaşabiliyorsunuz. Francesco ve Carla, ufak tefek sorunlarımızda ilgilendiler; yardımcı oldular. Sese hassas olduğumdan geceleri metro geçişlerini, titreşimleri ve sokaktaki sesleri duyuyordum. Bölge olarak kozmopolit. İlk günler sokaklardaki insan profilinden biraz tedirgin olduk. Sonra alıştık, gece de çıktık. Sorun yaşamadık.

- Overall wonderful and as mentioned previously the staff is incredible The apartment itself was spotless and had great comfortable beds, wonderful kitchen baths and amenities Location is close to the metro which was nice Air conditioning worked great I would say it was nearly perfect The only downside was the train underneath shaking the building that made it hard to sleep so I had to take off a star. Also, despite numerous signs asking for quiet, you could hear people next to you especially late at night so we ended up moving out of the bedroom nearest the hallway. Thankfully we had few enough people not to need that room so it didn’t bother us after the first time. There is a phone number to call if people are disturbing you. It would totally depend on which apartment you have I think whether or not this affects you
